## AI-attribution disclaimer

This pull request contains no AI-tool attribution metadata in commits or changed files — no model name, no SDK vendor name, no acronym for large language models, no co_authored trailer, no produced-with-AI phrasing, no robot emoji. The canonical block-list lives in `claude/hooks/strip-ai-attribution.sh`; the commit-message hook in `claude/hooks/validate-commit-msg.sh` enforces it.
